description: A colorful scene of a carousel or merry-go-round at a fairground. The carousel has a dark cylindrical top with a bright canopy of red, yellow, and orange scalloped awning. Crowds of people in colorful clothing gather around the ride and fill the scene. Some figures appear to be dancing or performing music. The palette is warm with yellows, oranges, and earth tones. The painting has a lively, folk-art quality with simplified but expressive figures.
